reviews.comment:
Siempre hay una ypf que te salva en la ruta , muy buena  atención

(Translated by Google)
There's always a YPF station that saves you on the road, very good service

reviews.comment:
Cargo siempre en la noche de paso porque viajo por ruta 7, eligi cargar todas las veces que viajo en esa estacion ya que los baños estan muy limpios y te atienden muy bien....

(Translated by Google)
I always charge at night while I'm passing through because I travel on Route 7. I chose to charge at this station every time I travel because the bathrooms are very clean and the service is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCdHBMU1F3EAE

reviews.comment:
Cómo cada vez que nos tocó cargar combustible,el sistema no funcionaba.
O mucha mala suerte o una costumbre para no facturar.

(Translated by Google)
Like every time we had to refuel, the system didn't work.
Either it was just bad luck or a habit of not checking in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCc3NQOWFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un solo despachador! Cola interminable!

(Translated by Google)
Only one cashier! Endless queue!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCc3NqQkRBEAE

reviews.comment:
30 minutos esperando al sol que alguien venga a recargar combustible junto a 20 autos más,  30 minutos por un supuesto cambio de turno, el lugar es lindo pero la atención mediocre.

(Translated by Google)
30 minutes waiting in the sun for someone to come and refuel alongside 20 other cars, 30 minutes for a supposed shift change, the place is nice but the service is mediocre.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMHFTVFdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente. Baños limpios. Lugar hermoso para relajarse un momento del tránsito de la ruta: mesas y sombra.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. Clean restrooms. Beautiful place to relax for a moment from the traffic: tables and shade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCd3RfVXZRRRAB
